message:
chore: remove unnecessary clippy::too_many_arguments allows in agent.rs

Remove #[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)] from
resolve_extension_policy_for_enable() (only 2 params) and
enable_extensions() (no longer triggers the lint after the recent
parameter reduction refactoring).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
